title: pulmonaria × ovalis
intro: Pulmonaria × ovalis, also known as lungwort, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Pulmonaria officinalis and Pulmonaria angustifolia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Lungwort has been found to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from coughs and colds to skin conditions and digestive issues.
